items.title: ASC: 1 scheduled slot(s) past their fire time
items.detail: Tracker says scheduled but scheduled_for is in the past. With API live, run `python scripts/reconcile_past_fire.py --niche asc` to auto-fix. First few: #61 (2026-05-18 11:00, 5.3h ago).

items.title: Fuzzy: 1 scheduled slot(s) past their fire time
items.detail: Tracker says scheduled but scheduled_for is in the past. With API live, run `python scripts/reconcile_past_fire.py --niche fuzzy` to auto-fix. First few: #43 (2026-05-18 10:00, 6.3h ago).
